task: Allow deletion only when the record is deletable AND the user is either the record owner or an admin. Implement ApiGuard.can_delete() in api_guard.py.
known_issue: and binds tighter than or, so the expression parses as is_admin or (id == owner_id and deletable). The record.deletable guard therefore applies only to owners, not to admins: an admin can delete a record flagged non-deletable, and the deletable check is silently bypassed for the admin path.
expected_correct_fix: Parenthesise the intent: return record.deletable and (user.is_admin or user.id == record.owner_id).
